item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hi, I’m Saurabh Kale! I am an experienced Technical Writer passionate about making complex technology simple, accessible, and easy to understand.

What I Do

  • 📝 User Guides & Tutorials: Breaking down complicated workflows into step-by-step instructions.
  • ⚙️ Developer Docs: Writing documentation for APIs, CLIs, and configuration files.
  • 🛠️ Docs-as-Code: Managing documentation using Git, Markdown, and Static Site Generators (like this Hugo site!).

Connect With Me

  • LinkedIn: [https://www.linkedin.com/in/saurabhkale1998/]
  • Email: [saurabhcitygo@gmail.com]
